title: humata ferulacea
intro: Humata ferulacea, also known as water spangle or water net, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Humata ferulacea include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and improving immune function, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional medicine, Humata ferulacea is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or ointment, and is also used in topical applications to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
